name: Toffee Ice Cream Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon espresso powder or instant coffee powder
recipeInstructions:
CRUST: Preheat the oven to 350°F. Process the graham crackers, butter, sugar, and cinnamon in a food processor until combined. Transfer the mixture to a 9-inch pie plate and press into an even layer over the bottom and up the sides of the crust. Bake for 8 minutes. Allow to cool completely on a rack.
SAUCE: Heat the cream and espresso powder in a small saucepan until warm, stirring occasionally. Remove from heat and stir in the chocolate and vanilla until smooth. Let cool completely. Place the ice cream in the refrigerator for about 30 minutes before serving. Spread half of the ice cream evenly over the bottom of the baked crust. Drizzle with half of the sauce. Repeat with the remaining ice cream and sauce. Freeze for up to 2 weeks. Remove from the freezer about 20 minutes before serving. Serve with whipped cream, if desired.
